name: ADManager Plus
banner: ADManager Plus criteria are pending official source verification. Please provide the official AD360 Health Check Criteria txt file.

criteria.text: ADManager Plus service is running under a dedicated service account
criteria.recommendation: Review and validate this item with the official product checklist: ADManager Plus service is running under a dedicated service account

criteria.text: ADManager Plus is on the latest available build
